thetrackerapp.io
Pricing Testimonials

About The Tracker App

A text-based fitness and health tracking platform. Log workouts, nutrition, water, and body measurements via iMessage, SMS, or Telegram — no app download required. Just text what you did and we handle the rest.

Frictionless Logging

Text "bench press 3x10 at 185" and we parse, log, and analyze it automatically. No menus, no friction.

Works Everywhere

Use the messaging app you already have — iMessage, SMS, or Telegram.

Live Leaderboards

Compete on strength lifts, calisthenics, daily streaks, steps, and miles — updating in real time.

Dashboard & Charts

Visualize your progress with charts for weight trends, nutrition breakdowns, and workout volume over time.

iMessage is a trademark of Apple Inc. The Tracker App is not affiliated with Apple.
